text.value: TC: ok i think that's us up
TC: hey everyone
TC: so ive been gettin a ton of messages with questions on the forums
TC: i guess because of my comic?
TC: and also some of the stuff i said on my site haha
TC: so im gonna run through some of these questions
TC: uh big thanks to my friends Lily and CC for helping collect questions
TC: man i was not expecting this many…
AA: Yes, the amount of interest in your life is frankly baffling.
AA: So I suggest we get started, before you ramble away our time entirely.
TC: haha yeah
TC: ok lets see…
Mike, what's your bro think of the Anarchist movements?
TC: he seems to like
TC: get very passionate about anarchism
TC: in all sorts of directions
TC: i cant really pin down his stance there…
TC: man i dont really know much politics…
TC: anarchisms about like…
TC: conquesting bread and stuff right?
TC: breads cool
TC: thats my final answer haha
hi mike, would you rather have a million dollars, or a dog that doubles in age every second?
TC: hmmm
TC: damn wow i wasnt really expecting anything like this haha
TC: so a million dollars is nice and all but
TC: i mean Bro always says money incentivises greed, corruption, and hoarding
TC: so i guess id have to take the dog right?
TC: what a weird question lol
mike is there an afterlife?
TC: man deep question haha idk dude
TC: lily once said something about bubbles but i never really got it
TC: how about we say a solid maybe?
mike if you were the president what's the first law you would enact
TC: oh that one is easy
TC: free healthcare for everyone
TC: seein what its like at bros hospital is rough
TC: it would just make everyone so happy like instantly
TC: and maybe Lily wouldnt have such a hard time gettin meds
i know everything about you, michael. did you know that?
TC: hey lily is that you?
TC: haha for a second that really freaked me out
TC: this is lily right
TC: uhh movin on i guess
TC: okay cmon whats the next one lily
TC: is everything okay haha
TC: youre taking a little longer than usual
AA: Hmm. I do apologise. I just didn't expect a question of my own to come in. I need a moment to answer it.
TC: oh right yeah i get that
TC: well whats the question?
TC: for the people at home yknow
AA: Dear Lily: Please could you inform us of a memory you cherish?
TC: they talk just like you its a perfect match lol
AA: I wish they had the decency to form a proper sentence, but alas. The original question reads "Lily: What's your best memory."

AA: That could mean anything! Could it be a memory I remember the most vividly? Or similarly a memory that changed who I am for the better? I simply could not know, so I changed the question to suit myself.
TC: oh wow thanks for the explanation lily its great to hear your insight
TC: what do you think the answer is then?

AA: This answer I do not "think" at all Michael. I know this answer. On a particularly cold evening I decided to allow myself the privilege of egressing this wretched place, unbeknownst to my aunt, and retreated to the relative safety of... the home of my other friend at the time. We watched my favourite show, Madoka Magica, and shared stories and I daresay it made us two girls feel magical. That is my answer.
TC: that sounds like a great time lily yeah good one
TC: were getting some great questions comin at us
Mike, thoughts on the current economic and social situation of kosovo?
TC: Man i mean the whole conflict has been a mess
TC: and while im glad things got settled
TC: all that fuss last year wasnt pretty
TC: and i feel the entire region has suffered from too much international meddling
TC: even if external forces are helping to minimise harm.
TC: At least that's the gist i get from bro
are you a dog or a cat person?
TC: oh dude id have to say if anything im a horse kinda person
TC: daisy is basically one of the family
TC: Cats are pretty cool tho, remind me of cc
Mike, is it true that you have a ghost cowboy living in your basement, and that he's gonna haunt you until you find his rusty harmonica?
TC: dude what?
TC: uhhh no man i dont even have a basement haha
allo mike! did you ever visit quéBec, "la Belle province"? did you ever taste some poutine? tell cc i said coucou! salut, là! XB)
TC: hey thats cool to see another canadian haha
TC: do you know cc too?
TC: ive never been there myself but ive heard its uh
TC:
TC: yeah im sorry about the whole situation
TC: stay safe out there man
Iirc Kamen Rider Decade is midway through its run as of April 2009, are you keeping up with the fansubs?
TC: not too much
TC: the site bro hooked me up with isn't updating too much
TC: english wise at least
TC: its always in french first
TC: i could probably ask CC to teach me
TC: if she isnt able then i could also ask-
TC: oh hey lily whats going on with the pc?
TC: theres some kinda warning on the screen idk is it a problem?
TC: dont wanna let the viewers down yknow haha

AA: I must give you thanks, Captain Obvious. You know, if you hadn't mentioned that I probably would have failed to notice the huge red legal notice across my screen. in fact given your condition I'm doubly proud of you for noticing, you really helped me out there Michael.
TC: sheesh haha so is it all okay?

AA: Oh, right. Sorry, no it's not going okay actually. I'm trying to wire CC into the call but her connection seems to be compromised, hence the warning. She says she's just trying another method but if this continues I sense this would be best saved for ano-
TC: ... uh
AA:
TC: lets uh
TC: lets move to the next question
mike whats your favorite kendrick album
TC: i only ever heard good kid maad city to be honest
TC: one time when i was bored i went looking online to see if i could find anything else
TC: was all under kdot which i thought was weird enough
TC: but no its just a bunch of admittedly pretty shitty mixtapes
TC: like i couldnt even find the album i have in my room haha
TC: guess he quit or sumn
TC: real shame either way
How’s your week been, Mike?
TC: it has been pretty sweet overall im gonna be honest
TC: ive not got nothin to complain about
TC: and the more i talk to folks the more i feel like that
TC: if that makes sense
TC: sorry this things makin me a bit nervous and now i just feel kinda bad haha

Mike, I'm sure your brother has a lot of thoughts and feelings on the subject but how do you feel about monsanto and their aggressive patent enforcement when it comes to their genetically modified seeds, do you believe a company should have any say on what you can or can't do with seeds you already purchased? And what about their part in agent orange? the people need to know your thoughts on this important part of the corn/agriculture industry. Also, just as importantly, who is cooler? Sonic, Metal Sonic, Shadow or Dave Strider creator of Sweet bro and Hella jeff??
TC: [off screen mumbling]
TC: my bro says that the family position on monsanto is not to be stated on any public forum
TC: and cmon man yknow my man dave is the coolest
Mike, have you ever been trolled by the people who troll John, Dave, rose, and jade?
TC: Oh man ive heard about that!
TC: they seem to be having some major issues with that
TC: but i cant say ive faced the same
Michael, do thou ride the motorcycle next to your house?
TC: my bro has a motorbike actually
TC: but sometimes he lets me ride around while he supervises
TC: its so cool! makes me feel like a real rider
TC: wait uh how did you..
TC: ok sorry about that
TC: i think were back now
TC: where were we
mike can you explain in more detail your thoughts on noxyquest
TC: wow yeah noxyquest
TC: look i really love like random humour
TC: you kinda have to to get the nuances of like
TC: sweet bro and hella jeff for instance
TC: yeah real random example i know haha
TC: but when i tried reading it the whole thing just went over my head
TC: it feels like a big in-joke that i dont even have the setup for
TC: guess its just some obscure reference humour
Michealangelo Corncoberton, how do you feel about Obama so far?
TC: theres a little bro on my shoulder who says that he's like
TC: not going to do much
TC: and theres like a little dave on the other shoulder that says some stuff about the econony of course
TC: i mean he made it into sbahj so he must be doin somethin right
What do you think of katanas?
TC: dave thinks theyre like the coolest thing ever
TC: i mean both him and his awesome ninja bro use them
TC: he told me they even have rooftop battles and practice techniques which is awesome
TC: but then my bro says theyre a symbol of the fetishisation of state violence
TC: he uses smth called a "jian mace"
TC: hmm i guess its what i think though right
TC: well im not all that down with weapons in general really
yo mikey, what's the secret to being so goshdarned cool like you? i wanna be cool!
TC: the trick is not to sweat it i think
TC: if you keep everything bottled up youll just look a bit sad
TC: but if you rely on your friends and tell them how you really feel
TC: thats how you keep up a chill appearance haha

Mikey boy, gotta know, thoughts and theories on Sweet Bro and Hella Jeff? Wanted to know some of that deep analysis you surely have, like all those important lessons it teaches. Also your favorite character, gotta know, always gotta know
TC: well i love the comic so much
TC: but anyone who knows me also knows i wont shut up about it lol
TC: for theories?
TC: hmm well i always kinda thought it was just a bit of fun yknow
TC: if i had to make up one up then maybe
TC: what if sweet bro was actually like evil and he pushed hella jeff down the stairs? wouldnt that be kinda messed up haha
TC: oh damn wait do you think we could get dave on here
TC: lily
AA: Barely heard you through this absurd display.
AA: For something with such a big mouth, Domo's pretty quiet.
TC: i dont know actually hes probably really busy
AA: Who, Dave?
AA: Really doubt it.
AA: Call him, just let me know when you're done. I'll go get a drink if downstairs is safe.
TC: ah jeez theres actually kinda pressure on me here to follow through now thanks lily
TC: alright ok give me a minute
TC: ok no big deal right mike just calling dave its no biggie you talk to him all the time oh god haha
TC: you know what big guy
TC: i fuckin believe in you
TC: you can DO this
TC: yeah
TC: sorry about that
TC: lemme pull this up here
mike can you make the last letter of your name into a "u" instead of an "e"
TC: Miku?
TC: like that uh…
TC: anime singing girl?
TC: its a cool name…
How do you do your hair? It's fabulous!
TC: bro makes natural hair gel outta processed corn… strong stuff!
TC: Flammable too…
michael, was there anything or anyone that inspired you to grow your hair out?
TC: was really a lot of things that came together
TC: if you wanna get specific uhh
TC: i guess i did it when bro said I could but like thats boring haha
TC: im just growin it until i feel normal about it
TC: not that i feel bad its just
TC: idk
TC: if John asks I did it cause of nicolas cage in con air tho cause that dudes curls are hella majestic
Mike. What do you think about John and his other group of friends?
TC: johns like my original best bro
TC: hangin at his was always the best
TC: his friends seem totally cool i mean dave of course is just about the coolest guy ever
TC: tt seems…
TC: intense
TC: but if shes friends with john and lily she must be cool
TC: ive heard a bit about gg? It all sounds a bit odd though
TC: i think dave is exaggerating a bit with all that psychic hellbeast stuff
what is, if you even have one, your middle name?
TC: well you see i dont have a real middle name
TC: but i always kinda wanted one so i didnt feel left out as a kid
TC: i asked john and he said that since i love birds so much why dont i call myself hawk
TC: and i probably would have fell for it too if he didnt laugh so much he almost threw up haha
TC: his jokes are the best
TC: oh hey surprise guest
TC: egbro is tryna IM me can i invite him to the call lily?
AA: We do have a schedule you know, but as long as it's quick we should be able to compensate for it. Approxmately 15 minutes of leeway, as it stands. Go ahead.
TC: thanks lils youre the best
Mike, who is your favorite Kamen Rider?
TC: Kuuga, man its not even close
Mike, does your bro have a favourite Che quote?
TC: “The true revolutionary is guided by great feelings of love.”
TC: that one always spoke to me
hi Mike! I want to ask what do you and your bro get up to when he's not at work? :3
TC: to be honest even the few times hes here hes still doin a lot of work around the farm
TC: so a lot of the time we spend is the two of us hangin out on the farm
TC: we didnt grow up with the most money so he just wants to make sure i can have a good life and eventually a good college
TC: its like he always says
TC: 'The best way to be paid is unmarked bills from odd jobs in a way that can't be tracked by the government to supplement legitimate income from a corn business.'
TC: hes a cool guy
mike whats your favorite thing in oklahoma
TC: honestly i love this house
TC: and getting to live here alongside daisy and my bro is basically the coolest
What was it like in Washington?
TC: Man i-
TC: i miss bein back there yknow?
TC: like i get we had to move and all, but it cant have been easy on john
TC: john already had some…
TC: stuff to work through
TC: and all of us moving away didnt seem to help
TC: man wow i
TC: yeah... i think im gonna leave it here
TC: thanks for comin everyone
